[issues/42] Add user authentication

## Summary

Adds session-based authentication with login/logout endpoints and a requireAuth middleware for protected routes. Users authenticate via email/password and receive a session cookie.

## Changes

- Added User model with email and password_hash fields
- Created requireAuth middleware that returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
- Added POST /login and POST /logout endpoints
- Documentation: CHANGELOG entry added under ### Added; README not needed — no new CLI commands or settings

## Test Plan

- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added for: login happy path, bad credentials, logout, middleware rejection
- [ ] Manual testing: verified login flow in browser with session cookie persistence

## Related

- Closes https://github.com/acme/app/issues/42
